title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Oil India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Oil India
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!
